headline: Milton Hershey School Trust Sells 30,000 Hershey Shares for $5.2 Million. Here's What Investors Should Know.
summary: The trust maintains ~1.3 million common shares and 54.6 million Class B shares, retaining substantial voting power in the confectioner.
